ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was assigned the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the request */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the requested data range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the requested data range */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
